description.zh-Hans: 使用分形中点位移和分支生成逼真的闪电。Time参数（0-1）通过改变闪电路径驱动动画效果。支持辉光效果和像素化量化。
description.en: Generates realistic lightning bolts with fractal midpoint displacement and branching. Time parameter (0-1) drives animation by varying bolt paths. Glow and pixel-art quantized.

triggers.zh-Hans: 闪电, 雷电, 暴风雨, 魔法闪电, 自然现象
triggers.en: lightning, thunder, storm, electricity, magical bolt

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成逼真的闪电动画帧，可用于场景特效或魔法技能效果。
exampleUsage.en: Generate realistic lightning bolt animation frames for scene effects or magical spell visuals.
